goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet' and 'address'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the south
Make sure you get whether they have internet and address
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of nightclub
Make sure you get phone number and entrance fee
